case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC VS. CECILIA HU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100166878) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HU, CECILIA
